name: Optimal Special Horse Configuration
description: Best configuration found from systematic study of 972 special horse variants

sigmoid_configuration.note: Symmetric sigmoid parameters used as baseline

interactive_visualization_settings.instructions: Load these settings in the interactive diffeomorphism explorer
interactive_visualization_settings.expected_behavior: Should show excellent symmetry (0.964) with moderate coverage (0.409)

research_context.key_insight: Distribution type and scale have minimal impact; base ability +0.5 is critical
